title: Testing Strategy for UI Platforms
content: Platform teams need confidence without slow pipelines. I separate tests by purpose: unit tests for behavior, integration tests for contracts, and smoke tests for release confidence.
Most bugs come from edge cases in state and rendering. Prioritize those branches instead of chasing full line coverage as a target.
Provide test helpers for product teams consuming the platform. Shared utilities reduce duplicated setup and improve consistency.
Treat flaky tests as production issues. Reliability of test feedback is a core part of developer experience.
